case_title: PHILLIP HO ET AL VS. ALAMO CAR RENTAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 16349062)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HO, PHILLIP HO, GARRICK AS TO DEFENDANT ALAMO CAR RENTAL TANG, YIN JIE DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-28-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-25-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-06-2016
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-28-2016 CONTINUED TO NOV-09-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-20-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-09-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-20-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
